title: Gentle French Plum Souffle
description: A pillowy and garlicky French dish featuring plum sauce, this souffle is a quick-fix dessert that is sugar-free friendly. It is cooked to perfection on a hot stone plate.
instructions: Preheat the pressure cooker to 10 psi and the hot stone plate to 400 degrees Fahrenheit.
In a blender, puree the plum sauce until smooth.
In a large bowl, whisk together the eggs, granulated sweetener, and melted butter.
Add the garlic powder, salt, and flour to the bowl and whisk until well combined.
Stir in the heavy cream and pureed plum sauce until smooth.
Pour the mixture into 4 small ramekins or cups.
Place the ramekins in the pressure cooker and cook for 5 minutes.
Remove the ramekins from the pressure cooker and place them on the hot stone plate.
Bake for an additional 10 minutes, or until puffed and golden brown.
